noiseMeterShusher.title: Noise Meter — Shusher
noiseMeterShusher.subtitle: Real-time dB & noise scoring
noiseMeterShusher.description: Measure ambient noise with timed sessions, category scoring, local history, CSV export, and charts. Ad-supported with optional Premium unlock.
noiseMeterShusher.learnMore: Learn more about Noise Meter — Shusher →

paratrooperBlitz.title: Paratrooper Blitz
paratrooperBlitz.subtitle: Classic arcade action
paratrooperBlitz.description: Destroy aircraft and paratroopers before they reach your turret. Arcade and Classic DOS modes, scores, career ranks, leaderboards and achievements on mobile.

hero.title: Noise Meter — Shusher
hero.subtitle: Real-time dB & noise scoring
hero.description: Flutter app that streams microphone input into approximate decibel readings, runs timed measurement sessions, scores the environment against common noise bands, saves history on device, and offers CSV export and charts. Monetization via ads and a one-time Premium unlock for extended features.

meter.title: Live meter
meter.description: Start and stop timed sessions; see min, max, average, and category labels with plain-language recommendations.
items: Approximate dB from the microphone
Noise score and category bands
Share-friendly results

history.title: History & export
history.description: Past sessions stay on your device; export CSV or share summaries when you choose.
items: Local history list
CSV export
Share sheet integration

premium.title: Premium & charts
premium.description: Unlock longer or custom durations and richer charts where enabled in the app.
items: Premium removes certain limits
Visual charts for trends
Ad experience may differ by tier

status.title: Availability
status.description: iOS and Android. Android application ID: com.zuki.apps.noisemeter. Store links appear when listings are public.

download.title: Download
download.description: App Store and Google Play badges will appear here when the app is published.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Noise Meter — Shusher. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your access to and use of Noise Meter — Shusher ("Service", "App"), a microphone-based noise measurement application operated by Zuki Apps. By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: The app provides approximate sound-level readings and related statistics for informational purposes. The Service includes:
items: Timed measurement sessions and noise scoring
Local history and optional export or sharing initiated by you
Optional Premium features and advertising as described in-app
Charts and UI that may vary by platform and version

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: The app uses the device microphone to measure sound while you run a session. Measurement results and history are stored locally unless you export or share them. Advertising and optional analytics SDKs may collect limited device or usage data per their policies and your OS settings (e.g. App Tracking Transparency on iOS).

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: Audio is processed to derive level estimates and scores; we do not use it for unrelated voice recognition on your speech content as a default product feature. Aggregated diagnostics may help improve stability when enabled.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. Data leaves your device when you share or export, when required by law, or when third-party services (ads, stores, analytics) process data as part of normal operation.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: Use a device passcode and current OS updates. Uninstalling the app removes app-local data subject to OS behavior.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You may clear history in-app, revoke microphone permission in system settings, or uninstall the app. Contact us for privacy requests applicable in your region.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Noise Meter — Shusher - All rights reserved

hero.title: Paratrooper Blitz
hero.subtitle: Classic arcade action
hero.description: Arcade-style mobile game: destroy aircraft and paratroopers before they land. Two control modes (Arcade and Classic DOS), scoring, career ranks, optional ads and in-app purchases, and Google Play Games / Game Center integrations on supported builds.

modes.title: Two ways to play
modes.description: Pick the control scheme that fits you — fast arcade movement or classic rotation aiming.
items: Arcade mode: move the turret left and right
Classic DOS mode: rotate and aim
Keyboard hints on supported platforms

action.title: Scores & career rank
action.description: Chase high scores and progress through themed military-style ranks as you play.
items: Session scoring with aircraft and paratrooper hits
Career rank progression
Game over flow with play-again

social.title: Leaderboards & achievements
social.description: Where signed in, use platform services for rankings and achievements as configured in the app.
items: Global and friends-style lists where available
Native leaderboard and achievement UIs
Firebase Analytics/Crashlytics may apply for stability

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Paratrooper Blitz. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the game.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your access to and use of Paratrooper Blitz ("Service", "Game"), operated by Zuki Apps. By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of a minor, you represent that you are the parent or guardian authorized to agree on their behalf where required.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Paratrooper Blitz is an arcade-style action game. The Service includes:
items: Gameplay sessions, scoring, and progression features
Optional integration with platform game services (e.g. leaderboards, achievements) where available
Advertising and in-app purchases as described in-app
Audio and visual effects; online features depend on third-party services and connectivity

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: The game may use Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics for diagnostics, platform sign-in for game services, and advertising identifiers subject to your device settings. Gameplay data may be processed by platform providers (Apple, Google) when you use their services.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use collected information to operate the game, show ads or offers where applicable, improve stability, and comply with law. Leaderboards and achievements rely on platform APIs when you opt in or sign in.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. Third parties (ad networks, analytics, platform game services) may process data under their policies when those features are active.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement reasonable safeguards appropriate to a mobile game. Use strong device security and keep the app updated.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, delete, or restrict certain processing. Platform account settings and OS privacy controls apply. Contact us for requests we can fulfill directly.
